title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 25 October 2024
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 25 October 2024
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 25 October 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 26/10/2024
This week in the ship recycling market saw consistent challenges across regions, with demand largely stalled and activity slow. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2024-10-26_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-19-October-25-October-2024_compressed.pdf

Weekly Ship Recycling Report
19 October - 25 October 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week in the ship recycling market saw consistent challenges across regions, with demand largely stalled and activity slow. In India, the market
continues to struggle under prolonged low demand and stagnant trends.
